title: S Bahn Berlin Pack
description: This project adds the famouse BR481 and 483 of the berlin S Bahn
body:
# Important. the current model of the br 481 will be remaked with a better scale! 


### This Mod adds the Famouse BR 481 and BR483 form the berlin Sbahn. In this pack you get 2 versions of the train. The old unmodernised version and the 2019 Modernised version. With detailed Exterior and interior and of course the berlin charme you can expand your trainnetwork. This Projekt is a beta and may maintain bugs or texture errors. If you find something write it in my Discord
